Petition To Suspend And Remove Co-Trustee And For An Accounting Or, In The Alternative, For An Order Instructing Co-Trustee To Provide An Informal
Off Calendar Dec-12-2016 Continued To Jan-09-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Suspend And Remove Co-Trustee And For An Accounting Or, In The Alternative, For An Order Instructing Co-Trustee To Provide An Informal
Off Calendar Oct-03-2016 Continued To Dec-12-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Susan Bower for (petitioner) Marwan Hannon. Margaret Martin for and with (respondent) Ziyad Hannon, M.D.

The Court asked the parties if they were close to resolution and if they are agreeable to mediation. Ms. Martin stated that they have provided all of the requested information, that they have discovered that there is an outstanding credit card in the mother's name which Marwan is using and that the current issues are the cost of the stair chair, the issue of the credit card and attorney's fees which they feel that each side should bear their own cost, and that Dr. Hannon had offered to have informal discussions at his house to provide all of the information but that Marwan was not willing. Ms. Bower stated that Marwan had been asking for documents for a year, that they had not been forthcoming until this petition was filed, that they do not have everything that they requested, that the assets are trust assets including the reverse mortgage, that they have asked for cooperation, that they disagree that this petition was not necessary, that they disagree that each party should pay its own attorney's fees, that Marwan is working to pay off the Macy's card and confirmed to the Court that they will get the verifications. Ms. Martin stated that they are at an impasse, that they negotiated an agreement regarding the checks and produced them, that petitioner is now on a fishing expedition, that they want copies of old checks that will cost $3.00 each to obtain, that currently statements are being sent to all family members and that there are limited resources that are needed for their mother's care. The Court asked about mediation. Ms. Martin stated that it might be worthwhile to have a mediator, that they have talked about deferred payments but there is resistance, that Marwan could open up his own credit account and transfer the balance and confirmed that they qualify for pro bono mediation. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than December 5, 2016. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by December 6, 2016. The matter was continued to and the Parties are to return on December 12, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

Petition To Suspend And Remove Co-Trustee And For An Accounting Or, In The Alternative, For An Order Instructing Co-Trustee To Provide An Informal
Off Calendar Sep-12-2016 Continued To Oct-03-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Suspend And Remove Co-Trustee And For An Accounting Or, In The Alternative, For An Order Instructing Co-Trustee To Provide An Informal
Off Calendar Jun-29-2016 Continued To Sep-12-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kristofer Biorn for (petitioner) Marwan Hannon. Margaret Martin for (respondent) Ziyad Hannon, M.D.

The Court confirmed that it had received the filings from yesterday. Mr. Biorn stated that the parties spoke prior to the hearing, that there is cooperation and that they think they can resolve the issues. Ms. Martin reported on the information that has been provided, stated that there was also a request for copies of the front and back of each check which they find excessive, that the statements indicate what many of the checks are for and requested that they review the statements and limit their request to what they actually need and that they hope to avoid discovery. The Court asked about the Power of Attorney issue. Mr. Biorn reported that there had been issues getting information but thinks things will change now that Ms. Martin is involved. The Petition to Suspend and Remove Co-Trustee and for an Accounting, etc., was continued to September 12, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Boncato. (Not Reported)
